# labyrinth-game Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-11-20

## Active Technologies
- HTML5, CSS3, Modern JavaScript (ES6+) + Native Web Audio API (Music), ZzFX (SFX - ~1kb micro-library) (002-game-audio-system)
- `localStorage` (for volume settings) (002-game-audio-system)

- HTML5, JavaScript (ES6+) + Vanilla Canvas API (No external engine) (001-maze-game-levels)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

HTML5, JavaScript (ES6+): Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes
- 002-game-audio-system: Added HTML5, CSS3, Modern JavaScript (ES6+) + Native Web Audio API (Music), ZzFX (SFX - ~1kb micro-library)

- 001-maze-game-levels: Added HTML5, JavaScript (ES6+) + Vanilla Canvas API (No external engine)
